Class PlayingController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.PlayingController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Controllable, Interactable
public class PlayingController extends Object implements Controllable, Interactable
PlayingController manages the play state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.

It coordinates the PlayingView, OverlayController, and BoardController to render and control the in game interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayingController

      public PlayingController(PlayingView view)
      Constructs a PlayingController object with the given PlayingView.

      Initializes the overlay and board components for gameplay.

      Parameters:
      view - the playing view used to render gameplay to the panel.

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates the overlay used by the PlayingController.
      Specified by:
      update in interface Controllable

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the PlayingView, OverlayController, and BoardController.
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics context used for rendering

      public void mousePressed(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with OverlayController when a mouse button has been pressed.
      Specified by:
      mousePressed in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse press status

    • mouseReleased

      public void mouseReleased(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with OverlayController when the mouse has been released.
      Specified by:
      mouseReleased in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse release status

    • mouseMoved

      public void mouseMoved(MouseEvent e)
      Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
      Specified by:
      mouseMoved in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the new mouse position

      public AudioController getAudioController()
